## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Diligent and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, analytics, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/cyvczqyVRyGKXzYzGmoCGiBn1Qk2Q7Nm?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX transitioning to Phase 2 (execution) with Megan Dickey joining as director supporting strategy](https://fathom.video/share/cyvczqyVRyGKXzYzGmoCGiBn1Qk2Q7Nm?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
  - [Analytics dashboard created; team discussing how to better measure content impact on funnel/MQLs](https://fathom.video/share/cyvczqyVRyGKXzYzGmoCGiBn1Qk2Q7Nm?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
  - [Content audit complete; team focusing on refreshes and new content aligned with key topics/clusters](https://fathom.video/share/cyvczqyVRyGKXzYzGmoCGiBn1Qk2Q7Nm?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [Action needed: Diligent team to review and approve proposed content topics in Content OS](https://fathom.video/share/cyvczqyVRyGKXzYzGmoCGiBn1Qk2Q7Nm?tab=summary&timestamp=1469.0)

## Topics

### Team Introductions and Roles

  - [Megan Dickey: New GrowthX director supporting strategy; background in journalism](https://fathom.video/share/cyvczqyVRyGKXzYzGmoCGiBn1Qk2Q7Nm?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [Kezia Farnham: Diligent SEO lead (5 years)](https://fathom.video/share/cyvczqyVRyGKXzYzGmoCGiBn1Qk2Q7Nm?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [Festus Shodipo: Diligent SEO team, handles content reviews](https://fathom.video/share/cyvczqyVRyGKXzYzGmoCGiBn1Qk2Q7Nm?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
  - [Tyler Phelps: New Diligent search lead (SEO, LLMs, SCM)](https://fathom.video/share/cyvczqyVRyGKXzYzGmoCGiBn1Qk2Q7Nm?tab=summary&timestamp=238.0)
  - [John Habib: Diligent content team lead, long-time employee](https://fathom.video/share/cyvczqyVRyGKXzYzGmoCGiBn1Qk2Q7Nm?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)

### Content Audit and Technical SEO

  - [404 errors implemented by Festus; broader set being addressed by web team](https://fathom.video/share/cyvczqyVRyGKXzYzGmoCGiBn1Qk2Q7Nm?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
  - [Merge/redirect opportunities identified to consolidate content and improve crawl budget](https://fathom.video/share/cyvczqyVRyGKXzYzGmoCGiBn1Qk2Q7Nm?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [Many high-performing pieces (ranking 1-3) identified to keep as-is](https://fathom.video/share/cyvczqyVRyGKXzYzGmoCGiBn1Qk2Q7Nm?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [GrowthX to continue monitoring site health monthly; full audit not needed quarterly](https://fathom.video/share/cyvczqyVRyGKXzYzGmoCGiBn1Qk2Q7Nm?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)

### Analytics Dashboard and Reporting

  - [Dashboard created with GA4 and GSC data; access granted to key team members](https://fathom.video/share/cyvczqyVRyGKXzYzGmoCGiBn1Qk2Q7Nm?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
  - [Includes overall performance, non-branded metrics, conversion events, referral breakdown by LLM](https://fathom.video/share/cyvczqyVRyGKXzYzGmoCGiBn1Qk2Q7Nm?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
  - [Discussion on improving event tracking accuracy and aligning with Diligent's internal metrics](https://fathom.video/share/cyvczqyVRyGKXzYzGmoCGiBn1Qk2Q7Nm?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
  - [Tyler emphasizing need for funnel mapping and measuring content impact beyond just MQLs](https://fathom.video/share/cyvczqyVRyGKXzYzGmoCGiBn1Qk2Q7Nm?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)

### Content Strategy and LLM Presence

  - [Focus on board/governance, risk management, AI-powered governance topics](https://fathom.video/share/cyvczqyVRyGKXzYzGmoCGiBn1Qk2Q7Nm?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
  - [1000+ new sessions from GrowthX content refreshes in 7-week engagement](https://fathom.video/share/cyvczqyVRyGKXzYzGmoCGiBn1Qk2Q7Nm?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)
  - [LLM referral breakdown shows Diligent's visibility across platforms](https://fathom.video/share/cyvczqyVRyGKXzYzGmoCGiBn1Qk2Q7Nm?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
  - [Team discussing how to better integrate Scrunch data for competitive LLM positioning](https://fathom.video/share/cyvczqyVRyGKXzYzGmoCGiBn1Qk2Q7Nm?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)

### Content Planning and Next Steps

  - [Diligent team to review proposed topics in Content OS, moving from "considering" to "approve to start"](https://fathom.video/share/cyvczqyVRyGKXzYzGmoCGiBn1Qk2Q7Nm?tab=summary&timestamp=1469.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide detailed keyword/search volume breakdown by cluster](https://fathom.video/share/cyvczqyVRyGKXzYzGmoCGiBn1Qk2Q7Nm?tab=summary&timestamp=1655.0)
  - [Discussion on aligning content strategy with internal efforts and off-page work](https://fathom.video/share/cyvczqyVRyGKXzYzGmoCGiBn1Qk2Q7Nm?tab=summary&timestamp=1735.0)
  - [Kezia suggesting topic-based approach for more cohesive content planning](https://fathom.video/share/cyvczqyVRyGKXzYzGmoCGiBn1Qk2Q7Nm?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send detailed search volume data by cluster to Diligent team](https://fathom.video/share/cyvczqyVRyGKXzYzGmoCGiBn1Qk2Q7Nm?tab=summary&timestamp=1655.0)
  - [Diligent team to review and approve content topics in Content OS](https://fathom.video/share/cyvczqyVRyGKXzYzGmoCGiBn1Qk2Q7Nm?tab=summary&timestamp=1469.0)
  - [Potential follow-up meeting on Friday if needed to discuss content strategy questions](https://fathom.video/share/cyvczqyVRyGKXzYzGmoCGiBn1Qk2Q7Nm?tab=summary&timestamp=1688.0)
  - [GrowthX to prepare merged view of entire content topic backlog](https://fathom.video/share/cyvczqyVRyGKXzYzGmoCGiBn1Qk2Q7Nm?tab=summary&timestamp=1846.0)
  - [Festus to share feedback on recent content pieces for improvement](https://fathom.video/share/cyvczqyVRyGKXzYzGmoCGiBn1Qk2Q7Nm?tab=summary&timestamp=1867.0)
